action: Changed max_iterations default from 5 to 100, updated fallback messages in run() and run_stream() to include iteration count
notes: Codex flagged blast radius concern (20x iteration increase without safety budget) — assessed as Minor, deferred to future milestone

action: Embedded Spinner in ToolDisplay: added _active_spinner attribute, spinner start in show_tool_start, spinner stop in show_tool_result, cleanup() method. Added tool_display.cleanup() in app.py finally block. 4 new tests, all 16 tests pass.
notes: Tests adapted from spec to use _themed_console() helper (spec used bare Console() which fails on tool.border style). Pre-existing test failures in test_capability.py and test_file_tools.py due to Python 3.8 lacking is_relative_to — unrelated to this change.
